mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WORKPLACE_MEMBERS (WORKPLACE_ID, USER_ID, ROLE, HOURLY_WAGE, STATUS) VALUES (#{workplaceId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{hourlyWage}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT ID, WORKPLACE_ID, USER_ID, ROLE, HOURLY_WAGE, STATUS FROM WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY ID ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT WM.WORKPLACE_ID, W.NAME AS WORKPLACE_NAME FROM WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WM INNER JOIN WORKPLACES W ON W.ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID WHERE WM.USER_ID = #{userId} AND WM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY WM.ID ASC
